steps.title: Separate the mechanism sentence
steps.content: The first sentence states that Paxillus panuoides fungi are associated with alder trees. The next thought explains the mechanism: by forming mycorrhizal relations, the organisms can create nutrient exchange networks.

steps.title: Avoid fused clauses
steps.content: A and B attach by forming mycorrhizal relations awkwardly to the first sentence and do not create a clean boundary. D leaves That is as a fragment before the parenthetical. A period after trees lets the next sentence explain the mechanism clearly. The answer is C.
